name: Graco Blossom 6-in-1 Convertible High Chair

specs.Stages: 6-in-1: infant booster, traditional high chair, youth seat, toddler booster x2, toddler chair
specs.Weight Capacity: Up to 130 lbs / 57.5 kg (all stages combined)

whatWorks: The six-stage configuration allows this chair to grow from infant feeding through a youth chair at the dining table—eliminating the separate booster seat and youth chair purchases that add up significantly over the years

Two dishwasher-safe trays (outer tray that stays on chair + removable inner tray that fits in dishwasher top rack) is the most practical tray design available at this price—parents with messy eaters cite this setup as a daily convenience
The machine washable seat pad can be laundered regularly without deteriorating—a critical feature in a category where food staining is daily and cheap pad alternatives crack or fade after 10 washes
Graco's build quality and parts availability mean broken buckles or worn straps can be replaced without buying a new chair—rare but meaningful for a product expected to last 5–7 years
worthKnowing: In all stages, the chair takes up full dining-table-chair footprint rather than compressing to a compact size; kitchen storage when not actively in use requires dedicated floor space
Transitioning between stages requires time—removing the tray, adjusting the harness, reconfiguring the seating insert—plan 15–20 minutes the first time you convert it between configurations
The seat height when in high chair mode is fixed; some dining tables are taller than standard (36 inches) and the Blossom's tray height may not align perfectly with custom or bar-height tables

commonComplaints.title: Buckle can be stiff and hard to release
commonComplaints.body: With food residue in the buckle mechanism (daily reality with a toddler), the crotch buckle can become difficult to press. Regular cleaning with a damp cloth in the buckle cavity solves this but requires attention.

commonComplaints.title: Seat pad stains even after washing
commonComplaints.body: While the pad is machine washable, dark food stains (berries, tomato sauce) can set into the fabric permanently even with immediate attention. Light-colored pad options look notably worse over time than darker colorways.

commonComplaints.title: Stage conversions take time
commonComplaints.body: Reconfiguring from infant high chair to toddler booster involves removing multiple components and references to the manual. Parents who expected a 2-minute conversion were surprised by the complexity.

verdict: The Graco Blossom 6-in-1 is the right high chair for parents who want to eliminate the high chair → booster seat → youth chair purchasing cascade. At $299, you're paying for multi-year coverage rather than a single-stage seat, and the math works out in your favor by year 3 of use. The Stokke Tripp Trapp is a better chair aesthetically and ergonomically for the dining table stage but costs more and doesn't cover the infant feeding stage. For value-conscious families who want one chair that grows with their child, the Blossom delivers.

realBuyers.quote: Seven years and two kids into this chair. Still using it as a toddler booster. The only thing I've replaced is the seat pad once. Worth every dollar.
The two-tray system is genius. Wipe the outer tray, pop the insert in the dishwasher. We use it every single meal and it's still clean after two years.
Converted it from infant to high chair to toddler seat over three years. Took a few minutes each time but the manual is clear. Great buy for the price.

metaDescription: Graco Blossom 6-in-1 high chair review: covers infant through 130 lbs with 2 dishwasher-safe trays. Best convertible high chair value for growing families. $299 CAD.
introText: The Graco Blossom 6-in-1 Convertible High Chair (ASIN B01M9HT3HS) transitions through six feeding and seating configurations from infant booster to toddler chair, supporting up to 130 lbs. Available on Amazon.ca, it features two dishwasher-safe trays, a machine washable seat pad, and adjustable footrest.
